requirements.jd_requirement: Design and automate Azure security controls
requirements.evidence: Built secure cloud operations across AWS, GCP, and Azure; implemented IAM, secrets management, and containerized security services in production environments

requirements.matched_skills: CI/CD pipelines, Automated build and deploy workflows
requirements.evidence: Designed and operated CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions/GitLab CI, infrastructure as code (Terraform), and release automation—prioritizing secure-by-default patterns

requirements.matched_skills: Vulnerability remediation automation, Endpoint hardening workflows
requirements.evidence: Owned end-to-end incident response workflows: built remediation scripting, patch orchestration, and endpoint hardening automation for Windows/macOS fleets

requirements.jd_requirement: Align with HIPAA, SOC 2, and HITRUST
requirements.matched_skills: Risk reduction engineering, Deployable security controls
requirements.evidence: Translated compliance requirements into deployable controls and operational runbooks; aligned technical controls with auditability needs across frameworks

requirements.matched_skills: Log analysis, Anomaly-oriented analysis, Security metrics and reporting
requirements.evidence: Built multi-source log ingestion, correlation logic, and anomaly detection pipelines using Pandas/NumPy; integrated Zeek, Grafana, Prometheus for observability and alerting

requirements.jd_requirement: Be first security engineer shaping cloud posture at a fast-growing startup
requirements.evidence: Acted as first security engineer in prior startups—translated ambiguous risk signals into concrete controls, documented runbooks, and enabled scalable security adoption across engineering teams

tone_notes: Match the JD’s pragmatic, mission-driven tone: emphasize ownership, operational reliability, and impact on vulnerable populations. Avoid overly academic or theoretical language—focus on shipped systems, automation outcomes, and compliance-as-automation.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a builder-operator who scales secure cloud platforms from zero-to-scale, with proven success building HIPAA-aligned guardrails in high-stakes environments—especially where security, compliance, and operational reliability intersect.
